entity.summary: Vietnamese Bitcoin trading platform launched in early 2014 by the BitcoinVN founding team and international partners. In March 2026, VBTC stopped onboarding new clients and new VND deposits and announced that its VND spot markets would close by the end of 2026. In May 2026, the operator expanded that plan to a full VBTC platform sunset by year-end while keeping existing users in a staged transition period.
entity.notes: HEI maps the candidate name BitcoinVN to the actual exchange service VBTC. BitcoinVN remains the wider operating group and continues other services. VBTC is limited, not dead: existing accounts remain in transition and the announced final shutdown date at the end of 2026 is still in the future. death_reason and death_date remain null until the terminal state is verified.

events.title: VBTC launched as Vietnam's first Bitcoin trading platform
events.description: The BitcoinVN founding team and international partners launched VBTC in early 2014 as a Bitcoin-to-Vietnamese-dong trading platform.
events.notes: Official historical material shows a March 2014 launch version; HEI stores a month-level marker rather than inventing an exact day.

events.title: VBTC began winding down VND spot markets
events.description: VBTC stopped onboarding new clients and accepting new VND deposits and announced that its VND spot market operations would close by December 31, 2026.
events.notes: Existing accounts could continue using the platform during the transition period.

events.title: VBTC announced a full platform sunset by the end of 2026
events.description: BitcoinVN concluded that VBTC was no longer the right vehicle for its future trading strategy and scheduled the full VBTC service shutdown for the end of 2026.
events.notes: This is a future terminal plan, not a completed shutdown. Users are to receive migration and withdrawal instructions throughout 2026.

evidence.title: BitcoinVN launches major upgrade
evidence.notes: Official history describes the early-2014 launch and shows the March 2014 launch version of BitcoinVN/VBTC.

evidence.title: 2023 - the new era for VBTC begins
evidence.notes: Official history identifies VBTC as Vietnam's first Bitcoin trading platform launched in 2014 and explains its relationship to BitcoinVN.

evidence.title: VBTC Service Announcement - wind-down of VND spot markets
evidence.notes: First-party notice stops new onboarding and VND deposits and sets December 31, 2026 as the expected VND spot-market closure date.

evidence.title: VBTC - full shutdown of service by the end of 2026
evidence.notes: First-party announcement expands the earlier VND-market phase-out into a full VBTC platform sunset by the end of 2026.

evidence.title: VBTC in 2026 - a year of transition
evidence.notes: Official retrospective confirms VBTC's twelve-year history, integration into the BitcoinVN Group, and the 2026 transition context.
